Venture Engineering And Construction, Inc.?S Amended Notice Of Petition And Petition To Compel Arbitration, And Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Action Pending Arbitration
Off Calendar Apr-29-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. RICHARD K. WELSH, Esq. of Alpha Trial Group, LLP (Tel: 310-562-4550) for plaintiffs;
Atty. PATRICIA L. BONHEYO, Esq. of Goodman Neuman Hamilton LLP (Tel: 415-705-0400) for defendants Venture Engineering & Construction Inc.

Hearing Re: Defendant Venture Engineering & Construction, Inc.'s Petition To Compel Arbitration, and Defendants Venture and David D. Moniot's Motion To Stay Action Pending Arbitration.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Venture Engineering & Construction, Inc.'s motion to compel arbitration is granted and Defendants Venture and David D. Moniot's motions to stay litigation are granted. (See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com. (302/EPS)
